include_rules.rationale: All five sub-pools are in scope.
Only liquid fruit beverages — powders and concentrates excluded.
Must have a fruit-based first ingredient or declared fruit content.

exclude_rules.rationale: Explicit scope exclusions per pipeline brief.
Products without a scorable nutrition panel are not included.

unit_override.rationale: Juices are beverages — all nutrition panels reported per 100ml. No unit conversion applied.

sub_pool_rules.juice_100: fruit_content_pct >= 100 OR label_claim contains '100% פרי' OR label_claim contains '100% מיץ'
sub_pool_rules.nectar: fruit_content_pct >= 25 AND fruit_content_pct < 100 OR label_claim contains 'נקטר'
sub_pool_rules.fruit_drink: fruit_content_pct < 25 OR label_claim contains 'משקה פירות' AND NOT nectar AND NOT juice_100
sub_pool_rules.smoothie: product_form = smoothie OR ingredient_1_type = fruit_puree AND texture = opaque
sub_pool_rules.cold_pressed: processing_claim contains 'סחוט קר' OR processing_claim contains 'cold pressed' — merge into juice_100 if fewer than 3 products
